specific_location: Behind the water treatment plant at Mulberry and Lemay in Ft. Collins.
description: Medium-sized bird with olive-brown back, streaked throat and breast. Slight yellowish tinge to breast and lower belly. Broad buffy supercilium, in this bird, widening behind eye. Post-ocular streaks and malar stripes. Darkish upper mandible, lighter, dusky lower mandible. Dark eye. Pinkish legs.Behaviors: Usually was walking while foraging along the bank, constantly bobbing and swaying tail and body. Flew on several occasions when flushed.Call: not heardPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper
